race.comment: GAMING (6) showed good early dash last start and held on well to finish a neck away in second at Coffs Harbour. Ready to go one better. JADE TREES (5) was on the speed from the rails draw last start and battled on well to finish third  at Grafton. Rock-hard fit now and can get the job done. GLAM (11) never looked likely first-up at Grafton when settling a mile back but she did warm nicely late to finish midfield. Is sure to have come on from that but will likely drift back again from the wide alley. Can cause some grief if close enough at the turn. COSMIC FORTUNE (14) was a barnstorming winner two back at Murwillumbah but couldn't follow it up last time. Has been kept fresh with 32 days - wary of a sharp bounce back, so keeping safe.
